antipattern.symptom: Long activities carry one number; project consistently late by 30%.
antipattern.root-cause: Teams resist PERT as 'too much work'.
antipattern.fix: Force PERT for activities >5 days via schema validator.

antipattern.symptom: Estimates fat with hidden buffer; project still late.
antipattern.root-cause: Buffer hidden in each activity; cannot be globally managed.
antipattern.fix: Use raw 50% estimate per activity + named project/feeding buffers.

antipattern.symptom: Critical path identified at kickoff and never recomputed; surprise late dependencies.
antipattern.fix: Weekly cpm.py run; surface delta from prior week.

antipattern.symptom: Two parallel critical activities both need the same person; one slips.
antipattern.fix: Run resource-levelling pass; mark conflicts in schedule output.
